entry.title: 测试文章
entry.content: <!-- 直接把爱心代码粘贴在这里！！！ --><script>!function(e,t,a){function n(){c(".heart{position:fixed;width:12px;height:12px;pointer-events:none;background-size:cover;animation:float 1s linear forwards;}@keyframes float{0%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg);opacity:1;}100%{transform:translateY(-50px) rotate(45deg);opacity:0;}}",t.head),e.addEventListener("click",o),e.addEventListener("touchstart",o)}function o(e){let t=document.createElement("div");t.className="heart",t.style.left=e.clientX-6+"px",t.style.top=e.clientY-6+"px",t.style.backgroundImage=`url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,)`,t.style.filter=`hue-rotate(${Math.random()*360}deg)`,t.style.zIndex="9999",document.body.appendChild(t),setTimeout(()=>t.remove(),1e3)}function c(e,t){let a=t.createElement("style");a.textContent=e,t.head.appendChild(a)}n()}(window,document);</script>

entry.title: 你也玩CSDN吗？
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

更多请访问我的CSDN: 外链
